location: Dropped by a Bloodhound Knight found in a hidden basement area of Volcano Manor. Two independent route descriptions were found in research — one via a Drawing-Room Key from Tanith unlocking a door with an illusory wall leading to a tunnel, another via the manor's lower halls near Prison Town Church — both agree on Volcano Manor's basement as the source, so treat the exact path as needing an in-game double-check.
tactics: Gain entry to Volcano Manor first (via Rya's questline, or the manor's own teleport-chest trap in Mt. Gelmir)
Head into the manor's lower halls/basement, near the Prison Town Church area
It's a guaranteed drop, not a rare one — you don't need to farm it
The knight hits hard in melee — bait an attack and punish the recovery, or fight from a doorway choke point
lore: Bloodhound Knights of Volcano Manor wield these curved claws in a fighting style built around slipping past an opponent's guard rather than overpowering it head-on — the curve is shaped to bite around a raised shield.

builds.name: Quality bleed
builds.why: Real STR/DEX quality scaling (Heavy pushes STR further, Keen pushes DEX further); its unique Bloodhound's Step skill is also a strong traversal/dodge tool with brief hazard immunity
